name: No-Knead Herb Bread
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:30
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water; let stand for 5 minutes.
2. Combine the yeast mixture, salt, sugar, 1 cup of whole wheat flour, and 2 cups of all-purpose flour in a mixing bowl. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer for 2 minutes.
3. Add egg, oil, herbs, and 1/4 cup of all-purpose flour; beat at medium speed for 2 more minutes.
4. Combine the remaining flours; gradually stir into enough to form a moderately stiff dough.
5. Divide dough in half; place each portion in a well-greased bowl, turning to grease the top. Cover and let rise in a warm place (85 degrees), free from drafts, for one hour or until doubled in bulk.
6. Punch dough down; shape each portion into a loaf. Place in two greased 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pans. Cover and let rise in a warm place, free from drafts, for 40 minutes or until doubled in bulk.
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 25 to 35 minutes or until loaves sound hollow when tapped.
8. Remove from pans and let cool on wire racks.
Yield: 2 loaves
